Features/Skills
Feat Count: Fighter: 1; General: 2

Two-handed Weapon With Buckler Penalty: -1 attack and AC
Quick Draw: May draw a weapon as a free action
Save: Fortitude: +6; Reflex: +0; Will: +2
Save Notes:
Constitution Fortitude Adjustment: +4
Wisdom Will Adjustment: +2
Magic
Potions/Oils:
Cure Light Wounds Potion (Adept1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (B1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+2 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (Blackguard1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (C1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (D1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (Healing1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (P1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+2 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds Potion (R2 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+4 HP (DC 13 Will half)
Scrolls:
Cure Light Wounds (Adept1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (B1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+2 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (Blackguard1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (C1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (D1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (Healing1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+1 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (P1 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+2 HP (DC 11 Will half)
Cure Light Wounds (R2 Conj): Touched heals (undead suffers) 1d8+4 HP (DC 13 Will half)
Notes
NOTE: ranger version has a higher effect because a ranger would need to be 8th level, with a caster level of 4, to cast an R2 spell. The higher DC comes from the requirement that a ranger would need to have a wisdom of at least 14 (+2 modifier) to know an R2 spell.
